sentences.target: Trace un trait là, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /tʁas œ̃ tʁɛ la sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Trace un trait là, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /tʁas œ̃ tʁɛ la sil tə plɛ/
translations.es: Traza una línea ahí, por favor.
translations.it: Traccia una linea lì, per favore.
translations.pt: Trace uma linha ali, por favor.
translations.vi: Vui lòng vẽ một đường ở đó.
translations.id: Tolong gambar sebuah garis di sana.
translations.ro: Te rog, trasează o linie acolo.
translations.ja: そこに線を一本引いてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative verb (2nd person singular) giving a command to draw.
Indefinite article marking a nonspecific masculine singular noun.
Common noun; direct object of the verb 'Trace'.
Deictic adverb of place indicating location.
Elided subordinating conjunction introducing the polite clause 's'il te plaît'.
3rd person subject pronoun (impersonal/expletive) for 'plaît'.
2nd person clitic pronoun (indirect object) governed by 'plaît'.
Verb (3rd person singular present); head of the parenthetical polite clause.

translations.en: I like that trait in you.
translations.es: Me gusta ese rasgo en ti.
translations.de: Ich mag diese Eigenschaft an dir.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢你身上的这个特质。
translations.yue: 我鍾意你身上嗰個特質。
translations.ru: Мне нравится эта черта в тебе.
translations.he: אני אוהב את התכונה הזאת בך.
translations.vi: Tôi thích nét tính cách đó ở bạn.
translations.nl: Ik vind die eigenschap leuk aan jou.
translations.uk: Мені подобається ця риса в тобі.
translations.hi: मुझे तुममें वह गुण पसंद है.
translations.pl: Podoba mi się ta cecha w tobie.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει αυτό το χαρακτηριστικό σε σένα.
translations.nb: Jeg liker den egenskapen ved deg.
translations.id: Aku suka sifat itu pada dirimu.
translations.sv: Jag gillar den egenskapen hos dig.
translations.ro: Îmi place această trăsătură la tine.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi ta vlastnost na tobě.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide den egenskab ved dig.
translations.ja: 君のその性格が好きだ。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic, elided before vowel-initial verb.
Main verb (1st person singular present) taking a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'trait'.
Common noun; direct object of 'aime'.
Preposition introducing the complement referring to qualities in a person.
Stressed 2nd person pronoun; object of the preposition 'chez'.

sentences.target: Il fait un trait au crayon.

translations.fr: Il fait un trait au crayon.
translations.en: He makes a line with a pencil.
translations.es: Traza una línea con un lápiz.
translations.de: Er zieht mit einem Bleistift eine Linie.
translations.it: Traccia una linea con una matita.
translations.pt: Ele traça uma linha com um lápis.
translations.tr: O kurşun kalemle bir çizgi çiziyor.
translations.vi: Cậu ấy vẽ một đường bằng bút chì.
translations.nl: Hij trekt een lijn met een potlood.
translations.hi: वह पेंसिल से एक रेखा खींचता है.
translations.nb: Han tegner en linje med en blyant.
translations.id: Dia menggambar sebuah garis dengan pensil.
translations.sv: Han ritar en linje med en blyertspenna.
translations.ro: El trasează o linie cu un creion.
translations.da: Han tegner en linje med en blyant.
translations.ja: 彼は鉛筆で一本の線を引く。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); here used with the sense 'draws'.
Indefinite article introducing 'trait'.
Common noun; direct object of 'fait'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition marking instrument/manner.
Common noun; object of 'au' indicating the instrument ('in pencil').

sentences.target: On efface ce trait et on recommence.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ efas sə tʁɛ e ɔ̃ ʁəkɔmɑ̃s/

translations.fr: On efface ce trait et on recommence.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ efas sə tʁɛ e ɔ̃ ʁəkɔmɑ̃s/
translations.en: We erase this line and start again.
translations.es: Borramos esta línea y empezamos de nuevo.
translations.de: Wir radieren diese Linie aus und fangen wieder an.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把这条线擦掉，然后重新开始。
translations.yue: 我哋擦走呢條線，然後重新開始。
translations.ru: Мы стираем эту линию и начинаем заново.
translations.he: אנחנו מוחקים את הקו הזה ומתחילים מחדש.
translations.tr: Bu çizgiyi siliyoruz ve yeniden başlıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta xóa đường này rồi bắt đầu lại.
translations.ar: نمسح هذا الخط ونبدأ من جديد.
translations.nl: We wissen deze lijn uit en beginnen opnieuw.
translations.uk: Ми стираємо цю лінію і починаємо заново.
translations.hu: Kitöröljük ezt a vonalat, és újrakezdjük.
translations.hi: हम इस रेखा को मिटाते हैं और फिर से शुरू करते हैं.
translations.pl: Wymazujemy tę linię i zaczynamy od nowa.
translations.el: Σβήνουμε αυτή τη γραμμή και ξεκινάμε ξανά.
translations.nb: Vi visker ut denne linjen og begynner på nytt.
translations.id: Kita menghapus garis ini lalu mulai lagi.
translations.sv: Vi suddar ut den här linjen och börjar om.
translations.ro: Ștergem această linie și începem din nou.
translations.cs: Vymažeme tuto čáru a začneme znovu.
translations.da: Vi visker denne linje ud og starter igen.
translations.fi: Pyyhimme tämän viivan ja aloitamme alusta.
translations.ja: この線を消して、もう一度やり直す。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun meaning 'one/we'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) agreeing with 'on'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'trait'.
Common noun; direct object of 'efface'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two clauses.
Subject pronoun repeated for the second coordinated clause.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) of the second clause.
